entry.title: Welcome to Resolute Raccoon
entry.summary: We're a community of elite student builders from Ozoro, Nigeria. We focus on:
entry.content:
We're a community of elite student builders from Ozoro, Nigeria. We focus on:

  • Cybersecurity — Offensive, defensive, CTFs, bug bounties
  • Systems Engineering — C/C++, Linux kernel, networking, distributed systems
  • AI/ML Engineering — LLM ops, agentic systems, computer vision, MLOps

What Makes Us Different​

No tutorials. Just work.

We curate the best free platforms (pwn.college, TryHackMe, PortSwigger, CSAPP, Fast.ai) into locked progression paths. You don't advance until you prove it. No one gets left behind, and no one skips ahead.

Community over content.

Discord for daily comms. Weekly syncs every Sunday 7 PM WAT. Quarterly 48-hour hackathons. Bi-weekly movie nights with technical breakdowns. Readers Club for technical + human breadth.

Ship or it didn't happen.

Every member ships projects to GitHub. Our Hopper incubator runs 6-week cycles: Pitch → Spec → Build → Review → Ship → Retro.

Join Us​

  • Discord: discord.gg/resoluteraccoon
  • GitHub: github.com/resoluteraccoon
  • Newsletter: buttondown.email/resoluteraccoon

If you're ready to stop playing small, you're one of us.
